sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30874" key="ei)du/llomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰδύλλομαι</orth>, <sense id="n30874.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">εἰδάλλομαι</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pempel.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.25.52</biblScope> </bibl> (nisi leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εἰδυλλέτω</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
